code_issues.issue: URL parsing errors discarded with _, causing nil pointer panic if URLs are invalid
code_issues.fix: Add proper error handling: authServiceURL, err := url.Parse(cfg.AuthServiceURL); if err != nil { log.Fatalf(...) }

code_issues.issue: Path traversal vulnerability in filepath operations with user input
code_issues.fix: Use filepath.Base() and validate all paths against allowed directory

code_issues.issue: Overlapping route patterns /api/v1/controls/ and /api/v1/controls cause ambiguous routing
code_issues.fix: Use distinct paths or register specific routes before generic ones

code_issues.issue: Race condition in testModeTokens map access without proper locking scope
code_issues.fix: Ensure all map access within mu.Lock()/Unlock() or use sync.Map

code_issues.issue: RefreshTokens stored in plaintext without encryption
code_issues.fix: Encrypt sensitive tokens at rest using encryption.Key from config

code_issues.issue: No input validation on Control struct fields before database operations
code_issues.fix: Add validation for required fields, length constraints, and allowed values

code_issues.issue: No rate limiting on Microsoft Graph API calls
code_issues.fix: Add rate limiter middleware to prevent quota exhaustion

code_issues.issue: CORS middleware not configured for cross-origin requests
No validation for TestUser fields (email format, required fields)
code_issues.fix: Add struct validation using validator package
